message:
feat(tui): add bubbles/table to history panel and fix toast dismiss animation

- history.go: integrate bubbles/table for row rendering with adaptive columns
- history.go: add table navigation (MoveUp/MoveDown) with cursor sync
- history.go: preserve filter systems (status/agent/time) with rebuildTableRows()
- toast.go: fix dismiss animation condition to properly handle slide-out
- styles.go: delegate to bubbles/progress for ≤2 color progress bars
- progress_test.go: add bubbles/progress integration tests

All 30 history panel tests pass. Closes br-pihrr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
